chunks.text: Technical Reports - Susan L. Graham. Titanium Language Reference Manual, version 2.19 (EECS-2005-15). Paul N. Hilfinger, Dan Oscar Bonachea, Kaushik Datta, David Gay, Susan L. Graham, Benjamin Robert Liblit, Geoffrey Pike, Jimmy Zhigang Su and Katherine A. Yelick. Transformational Generation of Language Plug-ins in the Harmonia Framework (CSD-05-1370). Andrew Begel, Marat Boshernitsan and Susan L. Graham.
chunks.question: What are two technical reports by Susan L. Graham from 2005?
chunks.answer: Titanium Reference Manual and Harmonia Framework.

chunks.text: Titanium Language Reference Manual (CSD-01-1163). Paul N. Hilfinger, Dan Bonachea, David Gay, Susan Graham, Ben Liblit, Geoff Pike and Katherine Yelick. Compiler Transformations for High-Performance Computing (CSD-93-781). David F. Bacon, Susan L. Graham and Oliver J. Sharp.
chunks.question: What technical reports are listed from 2001 and 1993?

chunks.text: The Pan Language-Based Editing System For Integrated Development Environments (CSD-90-593). Robert A. Ballance, Susan L. Graham and Michael L. Van De Vanter. Ballance, Michael L. Van De Vanter and Susan L. Graham.
chunks.question: What Pan-related reports are from 1990 and 1988?
chunks.answer: Pan Editing System and Architecture of Pan I.
